raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding two billing disputes with XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX, CA ) totaling {$4600.00} ( {$3500.00} and {$1000.00} ). 

1. Statutory Forfeiture of Right to Collect ( 15 U.S.C. 1666 ) : These disputes were initiated on XX/XX/year>. Under 15 U.S. Code 1666 ( a ), a creditor must resolve a billing error within two billing cycles, not to exceed 90 days. Citibank is currently at 93 days. Per 15 U.S.C. 1666 ( e ), a creditor who fails to comply with the procedural requirements of this section forfeits any right to collect the amount indicated and any finance charges thereon. I demand that these charges be removed in their entirety due to this statutory violation. 

2. Failure to Deliver and Merchant Misconduct : XXXX  Dispute ( {$3500.00} ) : After providing faulty designs, the merchant physically reclaimed the product three days later to " fix '' it but has refused to return the item or complete the work. I have neither the product nor my money. 

XXXX  Dispute ( {$1000.00} ) : The merchant admitted he " ran out of time '' to apply the coating, then admitted it was applied incorrectly, and promised an upgrade he never delivered. 
Under the FCBA, charges for goods " not accepted '' or " not delivered according to agreement '' constitute a billing error that Citibank is legally required to correct. 

XXXX. Bad Faith Investigation and Accounting Errors : Evidence Mismatch : The merchant is using proof of a different service ( XXXX  ) to refute the XXXX dispute. Citibank has failed to identify this non-responsive evidence. 

Ghost Credits : My portal states " Conditional credit applied '' for both cases ( see screenshots ), but these have never posted to my actual balance. This indicates a computational or bookkeeping error by the financial institution. 

Procedural Violations : Citibank closed my original case without my consent and without a written explanation, and has refused to provide the merchant 's rebuttal evidence as required by law. 

Desired Resolution : Based on the statutory forfeiture triggered by the 90-day violation, I request that Citibank permanently adjust my balance to {$0.00} for these items and reverse all associated interest and finance charges immediately.
